title: The Hidden Staircase
content: During renovations in an old theater, workers discovered a narrow staircase hidden behind a wooden wall. Curious, they carefully climbed the dusty steps. The staircase led to a small balcony that had been closed for decades. Old theater programs and forgotten decorations were still there. Historians later explained that the balcony had once been reserved for musicians during special performances. The hidden staircase became one of the building's most interesting historical discoveries.
